violations.text: Pasta was observed adulterated due to being in direct contact with unclean surface of pan. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024

Shell stock tags were observed not held in chronological order and in good condition. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024

Sauces and leafy greens were observed held past their date marking date. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) Rack and chains holding rack above prep area in kitchen had dust build up 2) The shelving in the walk-in cooler had an accumulation of biofilm New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2024

1) The ceiling tiles above the ware-washing area were observed not durable or easily cleanable 2) The wall behind the mop sink were not covered with a material that was considered smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbant New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The walls in the walk-in cooler had biofilm 2) The floors in the basement storage area had accumulation of debris New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2024
